widgets_values: Photorealistic minimalist side-profile portrait of a human figure wearing a sleek, futuristic black visor helmet that fully covers the face. The visor is smooth, opaque, and highly reflective, with a deep glossy finish that mirrors subtle highlights from the environment. The helmet seamlessly integrates into a flowing black garment that drapes over the head and shoulders like a hooded cloak, made of soft, matte-to-satin fabric with gentle folds and natural weight. The figure is positioned in clean profile facing right, with a poised, statuesque posture. The visor has a continuous curved surface with no visible seams, slightly bulging outward over the face area, obscuring all facial features while hinting at underlying structure. Lighting is controlled and studio-like, coming from the upper front-left, creating crisp specular highlights across the visor and soft gradients along the draped fabric. The contrast between the glossy visor and the softer textile material is emphasized through light behavior. Background is a seamless, neutral light gray, smooth and textureless, enhancing the stark, futuristic aesthetic. Composition is clean and centered, focusing on silhouette, material contrast, and form. Shot on a full-frame camera, 85mm lens, ultra-high resolution, shallow depth of field, hyper-realistic rendering, minimalist, futuristic, and cinematic style

nodes.title: Note: Luma UNI-1 Image
widgets_values:
Luma UNI-1 Image node is use for create new images
1. Create Mode generates **brand-new original images and compositions**, not limited to existing visuals.
2. It supports up to 9 reference images with defined roles (style, character, color, lighting, composition, etc.) for style or element inspiration.
3. Works with detailed prompts, adjustable aspect ratios and seed control to customize visuals.
4. Ideal for making new scenes, original artworks, or content inspired by reference materials without copying the original image structure.

groups.title: Select and press Ctrl+B to enable image reference
